## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? 1-3 sentences. -->

## Type

<!-- Pick one. Delete the rest. -->

- [ ] feat — new user-facing feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] chore — tooling, deps, internal cleanup
- [ ] refactor — code restructuring with no behavior change
- [ ] docs — docs only
- [ ] test — tests only

## Linked Issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If none, write "n/a". -->

<!-- How can a reviewer verify this works? Be specific. -->

1.
2.
3.

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- For UI changes. Drag images here. Delete this section if not applicable. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Added or updated tests for the change
- [ ] New env vars (if any) added to `.env.example` with placeholder values
- [ ] DB migration noted in PR description (if `prisma/schema.prisma` changed)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed
